analysis.consistency: Consistent with standard D&D 5e fighter fighting style features, specifically Archery.
analysis.quality: High. Clear, concise, and directly states the mechanical benefit.

mechanics.effect: +2 bonus to attack rolls made with ranged weapons.
mechanics.application: Applies universally to all ranged weapon attacks made by the character.
mechanics.balance: This is the standard, well-established power level for the Archery fighting style in D&D 5e, offering a significant and reliable boost to hit chance with ranged builds.

llm_audit.review_summary: The feature data is accurate and represents the standard Archery fighting style. No issues detected.
